items: Welcome by the School Board President, Janet Lawson
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Approval of the September 25 Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of the Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) between WestEd and the Redwood City School District for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of the Amendment No. 1 to the Agreement between One Life Counseling and Redwood City School District for the 2024-2025 School Year
Ratification of Warrant Registers, September 1, 2024 - September 30, 2024
Area III Trustee Candidate Presentations and Appointment
Area III Trustee Candidate Presentations and Appointment
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 11.1 (Area III Trustee Candidate Presentations) moved to follow item 8.1. Originally two hours for presentations with 20-minute break, then two more hours. Candidates dropped out, leaving 10 total candidates. Board decided to hear all 10 presentations consecutively, then take one 20-minute break, rather than breaking presentations in half.
